title: potentilla cinerea subsp. tommasiniana
intro: Potentilla cinerea subsp. tommasiniana, also known as the grey cinquefoil or tommasiniana cinquefoil, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to address various health concerns. Additionally, its leaves and roots are sometimes used in folk medicine to treat conditions like fever, coughs, and skin irritations.
